response.original_title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | October 11, 2017
response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded October 11, 2017.  Songs:  Welcome to an Altered Future  Digital Black  Han-Tyumi The Confused Cyborg  The Lord of Lightning  Altered Beast I  Alter Me I  Altered Beast II  Alter Me II  Altered Beast III  Alter Me III  Altered Beast IV  Host: Cheryl Waters  Audio Engineer: Jackson Long  Audio Mixer: Stu Mackenzie  Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Alaia D'Alessandro, Scott Holpainen, Luke Knecht & Justin Wilmore  Editor: Scott Holpainen
response.title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | October 11, 2017
